meta.title: How To Add Captions like Alex Hormozi with 1 click | NEW AI Auto Captions Tool
meta.description:
👉 SIGN UP HERE: https://bit.ly/Try-Submagic 
Use code: "dankieft90" for a DISCOUNT

As a Short form Content agency owner I am closely following the latest AI tools. Recently I came across a new tool that let's you create incredible looking hormozi style captions with just 1 click. In this step by step tutorial I'll show you how to use Submagic. Submagic is an incredible tool that let's you create captions automatically on your videos.

So before hiring a video editor to create your short form content, I would highly suggest checking out Submagic. The guys over at Submagic were friendly enough to share a discount code with me. Use "dankieft90" for a discount on your plan. With their Basic plan you can create videos for less than a dollar per video. 

If you are a short form content agency, definitely check out the Submagic Agency plan, which will save you so much money and time in creating content.
